```py
n_classes = 10
layers = [
nn.Flatten(),
nn.Linear(input_size, 512),
nn.ReLU(),
nn.Linear(512, 512),
nn.ReLU(),
nn.Linear(512, n_classes)  # Output Layer
]
```

train()
validate()
